title: limonium × valentinum
intro: Limonium × valentinum, also known as Valerian Statice, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the Plumbaginaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Limonium × valentinum include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and improving sleep quality, as well as having antimicrobial and antifungal effects. Herbal preparations of this plant are often used to create teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed orally or applied topically to various health conditions.
